No entries match the current filters.

Analytics

No analytics provider configured

This site is fully static — there's no server to capture traffic data.

To add lightweight, privacy-respecting analytics (no cookies, no consent banner required), add one line to templates/_layout.html:

<script defer data-domain="jiaoshoo.com" src="https://plausible.io/js/script.js"></script>

Once you have a Plausible or GoatCounter account, the dashboard lives on their site — this tab can display a link to it once you configure the endpoint in localStorage.

To set your analytics URL so this tab links directly to it, run in the browser console:

localStorage.setItem('shuwu_analytics_url', 'YOUR_DASHBOARD_URL')

undefined
